% fig_lec10_loop_holonomy.tex — Parallel transport around a rectangular loop on M
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec09_lec10.jl
%
% Loop in chart-α coordinates with corners
%   A = (-1.40, 0.40),  B = (0.20, 0.40),  C = (0.20, 1.90),  D = (-1.40, 1.90),
% so Δs = 1.6, Δt = 1.5, Δs·Δt = 2.4.  Initial vector v₀ = (1,0) in chart
% components at A.  Parallel transport around A → B → C → D → A is
% integrated leg by leg with the Levi-Civita connection of the induced
% metric.  The resulting discrepancy
%   δv = v_final − v₀  ≈  (-5.6e-3, 5.7e-2),  |δv| ≈ 0.057
% is purely second-order in Δs·Δt; we exaggerate it by ×14 for legibility,
% in the same spirit as the C-tensor figure of lec07.  Compare
% eq.\ \eqref{eq:delta-v-loop}.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      width=10.0cm, height=6.4cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    % Manifold
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_surface.dat};

    % Loop on M
    \addplot3[cgblue!75!black, line width=1.1pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_loop_M.dat};

    % Corners A, B, C, D
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec10_loop_corners_M.dat};

    % v₀ at corner A (full length)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5.5pt, width=4pt]},
      banana!75!black, line width=1.2pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec10_loop_v_initial.dat};

    % δv at corner A (exaggerated ×12 — see caption / data file)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      birrenred!85!black, line width=1.2pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec10_loop_dv.dat};

    % Labels
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-1.42,0.38,0.30) {$A$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north west]
      at (axis cs:0.22,0.38,0.50) {$B$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=south west]
      at (axis cs:0.22,1.92,0.50) {$C$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=south east]
      at (axis cs:-1.42,1.92,0.20) {$D$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=cgblue!75!black, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:0.45,1.10,0.45) {$\Delta t$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=cgblue!75!black, anchor=north]
      at (axis cs:-0.60,0.30,0.30) {$\Delta s$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:-0.95,0.40,0.65) {$v^a$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=birrenred!85!black, anchor=east]
      at (axis cs:-1.55,0.40,0.50) {$\delta v^a\;\;[\times 14]$};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
